Result of an Apigee to OpenAPI conversion.

Builder for ConversionResult.
conversionTimeMs(long) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ConversionResult.Builder
 
convert(Path) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee bundle to OpenAPI specification with default options.
convert(Path, ConversionOptions) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee bundle to OpenAPI specification with custom options.
convertAndSave(Path, Path) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee bundle and saves the result to a file, inferring format from extension.
convertAndSave(Path, Path, ConversionOptions) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee bundle and saves the result to a file.
convertFromApigee(ApigeeApiConfig, String) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee proxy bundle by downloading it directly from the Apigee Management API.
convertFromApigee(ApigeeApiConfig, String, ConversionOptions) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee proxy bundle by downloading it directly from the Apigee Management API.
convertFromApigee(ApigeeApiConfig, String, String, ConversionOptions) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee proxy bundle by downloading a specific revision from the Apigee Management API.
convertFromApigeeAndSave(ApigeeApiConfig, String, String, Path, ConversionOptions) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts a specific revision of an Apigee proxy and saves the result to a file.
convertFromApigeeAndSave(ApigeeApiConfig, String, Path, ConversionOptions) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee proxy and saves the result to a file.
convertFromApigeeToJson(ApigeeApiConfig, String) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee proxy and returns the OpenAPI spec as a JSON string.
convertFromApigeeToYaml(ApigeeApiConfig, String) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee proxy and returns the OpenAPI spec as a YAML string.
convertToString(Path, OpenApiWriter.OutputFormat) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ApigeeToOpenApiConverter
Converts an Apigee bundle and returns the OpenAPI spec as a string.

Extracts all security schemes from the bundle.

H

hasMethodConstraint(String) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.parser.FlowConditionParser
Checks if a condition includes an HTTP method constraint.
hasParseableCondition() - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.model.Flow
Checks if this flow has a condition that can be parsed for path/method.
hasSecuritySchemes() - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.extractor.SecurityExtractor.SecurityExtractionResult
 
hasWarnings() - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.ConversionResult
Returns whether there were any warnings.

Checks if this policy modifies messages (headers, body).

Checks if this is a "no route" rule (e.g., for OPTIONS preflight).

Checks if a condition is a path-based condition.

Checks if this flow appears to be a path-based conditional flow.

Parses an Apigee bundle without generating OpenAPI spec.

Parses an Apigee bundle from an extracted directory.
parseZipFile(Path) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.parser.BundleParser

parseZipStream(InputStream) - Method in class com.apigee.openapi.converter.parser.BundleParser
